task: Find a gas station in Manhattan, NY with a rating above 4.0, and sort the user reviews by the lowest rating.
graderReasoning: The agent searched Google Maps for gas stations in Manhattan, NY, identified 'Global Gas Station' with a visible rating of 4.3 (above 4.0), opened its place page, and used the review sort menu to select 'Lowest rating.' The final snapshot shows the Reviews tab selected for Global Gas Station and displays 1-star reviews first, confirming the reviews are sorted by lowest rating.
final_result_response: Done. I found Global Gas Station in Manhattan, NY, rated 4.3, and sorted its Google Maps reviews by lowest rating.
action_history: Opening Google Maps: const p1 = await openTab('https://www.google.com/maps/');
Searching for gas stations in Manhattan: await page.locator('e3').fill('gas station Manhattan NY rating above 4.0');
Searching for gas stations in Manhattan: await page.locator('e4').click();
Searching Maps for Manhattan gas stations: await page.locator('e29').fill('gas stations in Manhattan NY');
Searching Maps for Manhattan gas stations: await page.keyboard.press('Enter');
Opening a highly rated gas station: await page.locator('e95').click();
Opening review sort options: await page.locator('e180').click();
Sorting reviews by lowest rating: await page.locator('e221').click();
